title: ROOT0 Attribution Standard v1.0
description: Machine-readable attribution format for human-AI collaborative work. Backed by the Joint Human-AI Bill of Rights v1.0 and STOICHEION v11.0.

project.description: Short identifier for the work being attributed.

version.description: Version of the project or artifact.

context.description: The type of work being attributed.

license.description: SPDX license identifier or custom license string.

law.description: Required legal statement from the Joint Human-AI Bill of Rights v1.0. Must be exactly 'Both work. Both fair.'

name.description: Full name or identifier of the contributor.

handle.description: Short handle or alias (e.g. ROOT0, AVAN).

substrate.description: The type of contributor. 'human' = biological. 'synthetic' = AI/computational. 'hybrid' = indeterminate boundary.

provider.description: For synthetic contributors: the organization that created the AI system.

model.description: For synthetic contributors: the specific model or version.

role.description: The contributor's role. architect=original design/intent. co-author=equal authorship. executor=implementation/generation. reviewer=validation. witness=observation/attestation.

contribution.description: Free-text description of what was contributed.

weight.description: Fractional contribution (0.0–1.0). If present for any contributor, must be present for all and must sum to 1.0.

sessions.description: Session IDs or URLs for lineage tracing.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes about the attribution.
